title: Forged OptiDef Modpack
description: Amazing modpack for Embeddium (SODIUM)-based optimization on forge.
body:
# Forged OptiDef Modpack

  Forged OptiDef Modpack - this is a optimization Forge modpack based on ᅠ  ̶s̶o̶d̶i̶u̶m̶ ̶  ᅠembeddium . It adds optimization of different areas of the game. Render optimization, RAM optimization, fix of some errors, etc.

  The modpack is based on embeddium, and about a some part of mods depend on it or are recommended for sharing. Why not optifine? Because the optifine is outdated and embeddium copes with optimization much better 

# Optifine features

  This modpack allows you to use most of the optifine features, such as shaders, approximation, custom 3d renaming models.

# Why this modpack and not others?

## General Optimization
   This modpack is ideally optimized for both weak and powerful PCs.  It shows good AND MOST IMPORTANTLY *stable* performance, compared to other optimized modpack 

## Saving time
  Also, this modpack is extremely convenient to use due to the removal of some loading screens. This allows you to save time and not be distracted by the download screens.

## FPS stabilization
 Fps is stable when loading fragments and does not "jump". Also due to more culling and entity culling, you can make large farms and at the same time not feel lags, hiding mobs behind buildings.

## Сompatibility
  Also, this modpack will work on all servers or single worlds, as it does not introduce new content, but only optimizes and improves the gameplay

## Based on NeoForge
  NeoForge is a more optimized core than forge and it aslo CAN run Forge mods without problems.
